tools.name: get_site_info
tools.description: Returns basic information about this neighborhood directory: name, locale, domain, description, canonical URLs for key sections, plus the current LOCAL TIME and CURRENT WEATHER at the neighborhood (temperature, condition). Use this for any "what time is it there" or "what's the weather like" context

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: Returns the full category taxonomy of this directory site: top-level groups with their subcategories, localized labels, schema.org types, and live place counts.

tools.name: search_places
tools.description: Search for places (restaurants, cafes, shops, etc.) in this neighborhood. The `q` match is accent-insensitive and typo-tolerant ("acai" finds "Açaí", "restaurnt" finds "Restaurante"), ranked by relevance. Optionally also filter by category label or neighborhood. Returns structured opening hours (Goo

tools.name: get_place
tools.description: Get full details for a specific place by its URL slug, including opening hours, ratings, address, and neighborhood.

tools.name: list_events
tools.description: List upcoming events in this neighborhood with date, venue, price, and URL. Events within the next 7 days include a weatherForecast (condition + min/max temperature) for the event day — use it to tell users e.g. "the event is at X and it will be raining". Pass `filter` to narrow by time or price; `f

tools.name: list_guides
tools.description: List curated editorial guides ("best of" lists) published by this site — ranked places with editorial notes. The best source for "best X in this neighborhood" questions.

tools.name: list_booking_services
tools.description: List a venue's services — what it offers, with price and duration. Pass `place_slug` (from search_places) to list the services of a specific VENUE — a salon, clinic or studio listed in this directory; that is what you want in almost every case, and it is the only form whose serviceId works with crea

tools.name: get_availability
tools.description: Get available time slots for a bookable service on a given date (Wix Bookings). Pass the serviceId from list_booking_services and a date in YYYY-MM-DD. Pass the same `place_slug` you used there — slot times are returned in the VENUE's timezone, which is not necessarily the directory's.

tools.name: create_booking
tools.description: Book an appointment slot at a venue (Wix Bookings). NOTHING IS BOOKED UNTIL THE CUSTOMER PAYS: this returns a checkout URL, and the booking stays off the venue's calendar until a human opens that URL and completes payment on the venue's own site. Tell the user they must open the link. Call get_avail

tools.name: reserve_event_tickets
tools.description: Hold tickets for an event sold through this site (Wix Events) and return a checkout URL. THE HOLD IS TEMPORARY AND NOTHING IS PAID: the tickets are not the user's until a human opens the URL and completes checkout, and the hold expires on its own if they don't. Max 10 tickets and 10 ticket types per

tools.name: request_reservation
tools.description: Request a table at a restaurant. THE RESTAURANT IS NOT NOTIFIED YET: the request is held and a confirmation email is sent to the address you provide, and only when that person clicks the link does the restaurant receive it. Tell the user to check their inbox — the link expires in 24 hours. Use a rea

tools.name: rsvp_event
tools.description: RSVP to a free event on this site (Wix Events). NOBODY IS ON THE GUEST LIST YET: a confirmation email goes to the address you provide, and the RSVP is only submitted when that person clicks the link (expires in 24 hours). Tell the user to check their inbox. Use a real address belonging to the person

tools.name: get_event_tickets
tools.description: Get ticket types and prices for a specific event (Wix Events). Pass the event slug from list_events. Returns ticket names, prices, sale status, and how many are left.

tools.name: list_products
tools.description: List products in this site's store (Wix Stores). Returns name, price, stock status, and product type.

tools.name: create_checkout
tools.description: Create a direct checkout URL for one or more store products (Wix Stores). The user clicks the URL to complete payment on the site — no login required on the AI agent side.

tools.name: get_restaurant_menus
tools.description: Get the food menu for a specific restaurant on this site. Returns menus with their sections, dishes, descriptions, prices, and dietary labels (vegan, gluten-free, etc). Use search_places or list_categories first to find the restaurant's place_slug.

tools.name: search_dishes
tools.description: Find which restaurants serve a dish in this neighborhood. Searches every menu item across all restaurants on the site, grouped by dish — e.g. query "feijoada" returns each restaurant serving it with price, description, dietary labels, and the place URL. Omit the query to list the most-served dishes.

tools.name: list_pricing_plans
tools.description: List membership or subscription plans offered by this site (Wix Pricing Plans). Returns plan name, price, billing cycle, perks, and a direct checkout URL.

tools.name: get_reviews
tools.description: Get published reviews for this site (Wix Reviews). Returns reviewer name, rating, title, and content.

tools.name: list_blog_posts
tools.description: List recent published blog posts for this site (Wix Blog). Returns title, excerpt, author, published date, reading time, categories, and the post URL.

tools.name: list_faqs
tools.description: Get all FAQ questions and answers for this site (Wix FAQ). Grouped by category. Use this to answer common questions about the site — opening hours, parking, policies, etc.

tools.name: list_forms
tools.description: List available contact/signup forms on this site (Wix Forms). Returns form name, ID, and field definitions (label, type, required). Use before submit_form to discover which fields to fill.

tools.name: submit_form
tools.description: Submit a form on behalf of the user (Wix Forms). Call list_forms first to get the formId and field keys. Returns a submissionId on success.

tools.name: get_loyalty_info
tools.description: Get the loyalty/rewards program details for this site (Wix Loyalty). Returns program name, points currency name, and tier structure with required points per tier.

tools.name: list_offers
tools.description: List active promotions and deals available in this neighborhood directory. Returns discount label, promo code (if any), CTA link, validity window, and which business/place it belongs to. FLASH offers have a countdown deadline.

tools.name: list_profiles
tools.description: List solo service-provider profiles on this site — businesses without a fixed physical location (e.g. dog walkers, tutors, personal trainers). Returns name, profile URL, category, and any available metadata (age, height, etc.).

tools.name: list_movies
tools.description: List movies available in this neighborhood (only on sites with movies_enabled). Returns now-showing films (with actual showtimes at local cinemas), coming-soon films, and streaming availability. Includes title, genres, TMDB rating, runtime, and detail URL.

tools.name: get_showtimes
tools.description: Get showtimes for a specific movie at cinemas in this neighborhood, for a given date. Returns each cinema with session times, format (e.g. "Laser", "3D"), and language (Dublado/Legendado). Requires movies_enabled on this site.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_site_info, get_place, list_events, create_booking, request_reservation, rsvp_event, get_event_tickets, search_dishes, list_pricing_plans, get_reviews, list_blog_posts, list_profiles, list_movies · Private data: create_booking, list_forms · Public sink: create_booking, request_reservation, rsvp_event, list_blog_posts, submit_form · Destructive: search_places, get_showtimes.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_site_info, get_place, list_events, create_booking, request_reservation, rsvp_event, get_event_tickets, search_dishes, list_pricing_plans, get_reviews, list_blog_posts, list_profiles, list_movies · Private data: create_booking, list_forms · Public sink: create_booking, request_reservation, rsvp_event, list_blog_posts, submit_form · Destructive: search_places, get_showtimes

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
